title: Internet Information Resources * LGBTQ2+ Issues - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Diverse Populations > Internet Information Resources * LGBTQ2+ Issues 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Refine Results - Select - Immigration Issues LGBTQ2+ Issues Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF GAY LESBIAN STRAIGHT EDUCATION NETWORK STUDENT ACTION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Works to ensure LGBTQ2+ student safety and wellness by providing educational resources for students, educators, and family members. Online resources include materials for creating Gay-Straight Alliances, Students Leadership Teams, and Transgender Student Rights materials. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable Email (212) 727-0135 6565 Visit Website More Details THE TREVOR PROJECT TREVOR PROJECT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides crisis intervention, suicide prevention services, peer support, and outside referrals relating to sexual orientation or gender identity issues. Eligibility: Ages 13-24 who identify as lesbian, gay, bisexual, transgender, queer, or questioning Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (866) 488-7386 24 7 Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
